summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoFlip v2.0 Enhanced Calculation Engine. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified dashboard loading, AI damage badges, detail dialog with breakdown sections, salvage title calculations, and filter functionality.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns version 2.0.0
GET /api/listings returns listings with calc_version='v2.0' (79 listings)
GET /api/listings includes mv_breakdown with all required fields (msrp, msrp_source, depreciation, brand, brand_mult, body_mult, trim_mult, color_mult, mileage_mult, title_status, title_mult, age)
GET /api/listings includes repair_breakdown with required fields (repair_labour_parts_low/high, safety_inspection, salvage_to_rebuilt_cost, severity_applied, damage_source)
GET /api/listings includes fees_breakdown with correct Ontario fees (HST 13%, OMVIC $22, MTO $32, Safety $100)
GET /api/listings?brand_type=salvage returns salvage listings with title_mult=0.55
Salvage listings include salvage_to_rebuilt_cost=$625
Clean title listings have salvage_to_rebuilt_cost=0
ai_damage_detected and ai_damage_details fields present on all listings
25 listings have AI damage detection enabled
GET /api/listings/{listing_id} returns complete v2 data for single listing
GET /api/listings/{invalid_id} returns 404
GET /api/calc-methodology returns 200
calc-methodology has all sections: version, engine, market_value, repair_cost, ontario_fees, profit_calculation, deal_scoring, technologies
calc-methodology market_value section documents all 8 factors including AI Damage Detection
GET /api/stats returns correct score distribution (BUY:7, WATCH:7, SKIP:38, No Score:27)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 79 results
Frontend: AI badge (blue 'AI' icon) visible on listings with AI damage detection
Frontend: Detail dialog opens on listing click
Frontend: Detail dialog shows Profit Analysis with Market Value, Purchase Price, Repair Estimates, Ontario Fees
Frontend: 'View calculation breakdown' expandable section shows MSRP, Depreciation, Brand Retention, Body Type, Trim, Color, Mileage multipliers
Frontend: Salvage listing (Palisade) shows 'Salvage: 55% of clean value' note and $625 salvage-to-rebuilt cost
Frontend: AI Vision detected damage notice displayed in Toyota Prius dialog with severity details
Frontend: All filters work (brand_type, status, source, sort)
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing scraped listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.0 calculation engine fully tested. Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_v2_calc_engine.py covers: API version, mv_breakdown, repair_breakdown, fees_breakdown, salvage title multiplier (0.55), salvage-to-rebuilt cost ($625), AI damage detection fields, calc-methodology documentation, stats endpoint. Frontend verified: AI badges appear on 25+ listings, detail dialog shows full profit analysis with expandable calculation breakdown showing all multipliers, salvage listings show 55% value note and $625 process cost, AI damage notice with severity details displayed prominently.
